funding: $596 million across multiple funding rounds, reached unicorn status in 2021
users: Over 80+ million users, 10+ million active stock market investors (as of 2024)
positioning: India's #1 Investing Platform, simplifying financial investing for millennials and Gen Z with a mobile-first, minimalist platform.
revenue_model: Brokerage on equity and derivatives, mutual fund distribution fees, lending/subscribe products, paid advisory, margin lending, B2B distribution partnerships.
problems: Customer complaints regarding incorrect investment reflections and potential fraud (clarified as technical glitches)
Platform perceived as for 'noobs' by some advanced users.
complaints: Allegations of fraud and scam related to mutual fund investments not being processed correctly (Groww claims these were technical glitches and no money was lost)
Slow resolution of app login issues.
strategic_moves: Launched Groww Pay (UPI) and entered lending
Expanding into wealth management with 'W by Groww'
Launching new trading terminal '915' for professional traders
milestones: Introduced stock investing and intraday trading (2020)
Became India's largest broker by active clients (September 2023)
other_details: Formerly known as Nextbillion Technology Pvt. Ltd.
